citation_tightness.note: All factual claims are cited with adjacent markers [1]-[11].

completeness.note: Covers major evidence rows (investments, market growth, regulatory status) but lacks specific current capacity metrics and safety data.

flow.note: Logical progression from manufacturing investments to market dynamics to long-term strategies, followed by limitations.

hedging_appropriateness.note: Overconfident projections (e.g., 'expected to grow significantly', 'now expecting full-year revenue') lack hedging language despite reliance on lower-tier sources.

tone_consistency.note: Tone remains evidence-grounded, avoiding promotional language even in sections about revenue growth.
